title: Sustainable Solutions for Food Loss and Waste Prevention
subtitle: Towards a New Zero Food Waste Mindset Based on Holistic Assessment
description: A European project developing holistic assessment tools and strategies to prevent and reduce food loss and waste across the fresh food value chain. It equips farmers, supply chain actors, consumers, and policymakers with standardized impact information and co-creates sustainable pathways to shift Europe towards resilient and inclusive food production and consumption.
